MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Weyland, attorney for Plaintiffs John Leventini and Heather Leventini. No other party, counsel or interested person appeared.

Mr. Weyland reports on the status of the settlement, noting that Phase I [close of escrow] has been completed. Phase II, consisting of the Defendant's move out of the unit is anticipated to complete in about 7 or 8 months. After discussion, the Court continues the hearing [OSC re: Dismissal] to March 22, 2019 at 1:30 p.m.

Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric C. Shaw (415-536-2800) for Plaintiff/ opposing party John A. Leventini.
Jeffrey Kirschenbaum (510-740-9260) for Defendant/Moving party MEAGAN MIELKE.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The court formerly passed the matter twice and adopted the tentative ruling since no counsel was present at the inital and second calling of this matter. The previously adopted reuling is vacated. Hearing is held. Argued re: service. Defense submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs JOHN LEVENTINI, HEATHER LEVENTINI's Motion For An Order Compelling Discovery, And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
